340002.name: Mission Hospital
340002.bannerNote: Not under Immediate Jeopardy as of Mar 4, 2026 (4th IJ removed after Enhanced Plan of Correction).

ij.note: Four IJs since 2019 HCA sale; cleared Mar 4, 2026. Sourced from CMS/NCDHHS Form 2567 reporting.

staffRatio.note: CMS HCRIS S-3 Part I line 14: employees on payroll FTEs (col 10) ÷ beds (col 2); FY ends Sept. FY2019 uses the post-sale report (02/01/2019–09/30/2019; pre-sale stub Oct–Jan was 7.4). FY2025 pending CMS processing.

travelers.note: Travel RN headcounts from Asheville Watchdog staffing lists (not audited Worksheet S-3). Dec 2025: ~527 travelers + ~1,500 FT nurses ≈ 2,027 total (~26% travelers; national norm ~3–4%). Sep 2023 (352) and Feb 2024 (376) have no published hospital-wide nursing denominator, so % is omitted for those points.

starTrend.note: 2018–2024 compiled from CMS archive analyses (Asheville Watchdog / public CMS); 2025 from current CMS HCAHPS release.

overallTrend.note: CMS Care Compare Hospital overall rating from archived Hospital General Information releases (Oct/Nov each year; 2026 from May 2026 extract).
